headline: Reliable, High-Speed Internet from Xfinity Now Available in Wilton, Connecticut
summary: BERLIN, Conn., April 14, 2026--More than 7,000 new homes and businesses in Wilton, Connecticut now have access to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. Xfinity brings Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services together in one simple, seamless solution – giving customers more speed, savings, and control over their connected lives.
